claim.content: For the paramagnetic two-dimensional homogeneous electron gas at density parameter r_s=5, the same extrapolation procedure applied to the DMC quartic-fit band data yields the thermodynamic-limit quasiparticle effective mass m^*(∞)=1.04(2) a.u., with m^* defined as m^*=k_F/(dE/dk)_{k_F}.
